subcodes.first_line: O kind friends! The detailed letters that have arrived from Tihran are, as they are harbingers of discord, to be noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان مهربان نامه های مفصل که از طهران رسیده چون منادی اختلافست ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @elections, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
